nodes.label: Home Screen — Inactive State
nodes.description: Home tab in inactive/pre-session state. Greets user by name ('Buenas tardes, Juan, ¿Listo para el ritual de hoy?'), shows focus improvement app list (Instagram, TikTok, YouTube, Facebook) with block toggles, and a concentration improvement CTA. Bottom navigation visible: Home, Explorar, IA, Comunidad, Perfil.

nodes.label: Personalized Greeting Banner
nodes.description: Greeting message 'Buenas tardes, Juan, ¿Listo para el ritual de hoy?' displayed at the top of the Home screen in inactive state. Personalized with user name.

nodes.label: App Block Toggle List — Home Inactive
nodes.description: List of apps to block for concentration (Instagram, TikTok, YouTube, Facebook) shown with on/off toggle switches under 'Mejora tu concentración' section on the Home screen inactive state.

nodes.label: Bottom Navigation Bar
nodes.description: 5-tab bottom navigation: Home (active), Explorar, IA, Comunidad, Perfil. Dark background, icon + label style.
